scenarios.label: Healthy pipeline state
scenarios.summary: All lifecycle stages passed with no blocking policy findings.

stages.name: update
stages.detail: Sources resolved and lockfile updated with pinned versions.

stages.name: scan
stages.detail: Policy checks passed without high-severity violations.

stages.name: apply
stages.detail: Planned actions applied idempotently across configured targets.

changes: Added two pinned skill entries to lockfile.
Policy scanner updated trust annotations for one source.
No adapter drift detected across targets.
nextActions: Run pnpm ci:local before pushing branch.

scenarios.label: Warning: stale evidence snapshot
scenarios.summary: Pipeline previously passed, but source metadata changed after the last scan.

stages.name: update
stages.detail: Manifest sync complete with deterministic lock updates.

stages.name: scan
stages.detail: Evidence timestamp older than manifest update timestamp.

stages.name: apply
stages.detail: Last apply succeeded but should be revalidated.

changes: Manifest hash differs from last scan artifact.
Two skill metadata fields changed upstream.
No blocked policy findings yet, but trust decision is provisional.
nextActions: Run pnpm tsx src/cli.ts scan --format json.
Run pnpm tsx src/cli.ts pipeline run --json to refresh evidence.
Update review with new generatedAt timestamp.

scenarios.label: Blocked: policy failure
scenarios.summary: Scan detected a blocking policy rule and prevented apply execution.

stages.name: update
stages.detail: Resolution completed for all manifest entries.

stages.name: scan
stages.detail: Detected disallowed command pattern in skill instructions.

stages.name: apply
stages.detail: Apply intentionally skipped because fail mode is security fail.

changes: One skill flagged for remote shell invocation risk.
Policy fail mode security fail blocked downstream actions.
No target directories were modified after block.
nextActions: Run pnpm tsx src/cli.ts policy check --explain --json.
Generate fix plan with pnpm tsx src/cli.ts fix --plan --json.
